form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Comes off a 42 day let-up. Resuming second last of 7 at this track on February 6 over 1646m, 13 len behind Septarian with 54kg at $13.20. Second-up settled back and ran on when 7th of 10 at Tampa Bay Downs Turf on March 4 over 1710m, 11 len behind Mcravin carrying 54kg at $62.50. Recent form not good enough.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by 0.8 len at this track March 20 over 1207m defeating Roar Of The Beast with 54.5kg at $4.70. The run before that 2nd of 9 at this track on February 28 over 1408m, 3 len behind Flood Zone carrying 54.5kg at $9.20. Great chance to win again.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 45-day let-up. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at Gulfstream Park on March 1 over 1308m, 4 len behind Rookie Card carrying 55kg at $2.60. Before that second last in a small field at Gulfstream Park on January 25 over 1408m, 5 len behind Flying Liam carrying 55kg at $4.60. Has the ability to be in the finish.
